items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A button built on the shadcn button that adds a loading state with a spinner and optional loading text.

items.name: loading-screen
items.title: Loading Screen
items.description: A full-area loading state with a spinning ring and optional centered logo.

items.name: theme-toggle
items.title: Theme Toggle
items.description: A dropdown to switch between light, dark and system theme. Requires ThemeProvider (included).

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tabs built on Base UI with default and line variants, horizontal and vertical orientation and an animated sliding indicator.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog built on Base UI with overlay, header, scrollable body, footer and an optional close button.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A swipeable drawer built on Base UI with overlay, handle, header, footer and directional placement.

items.name: not-found
items.title: Not Found
items.description: A centered 404 page with icon, title and description. Title and description are customizable.

items.name: linear-progress
items.title: Linear Progress
items.description: An indeterminate linear progress bar with two color bars sweeping across a faint track, recreated in self-contained CSS.

items.name: circular-progress
items.title: Circular Progress
items.description: An indeterminate circular spinner recreating the Material UI CircularProgress animation in self-contained CSS, with lucide-style defaults.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A styled table with header, body, footer and a truncated cell helper.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A TanStack Table wrapper with sorting, filtering, pagination, column visibility and CSV export. Built from the shadcn tasks example.

items.name: formatters
items.title: Formatters
items.description: Currency, number and string formatters using Intl with compact notation and currency display helpers.

items.name: microsoft-login
items.title: Microsoft Login
items.description: A centered sign-in page with a Microsoft SSO button, title, description and admin contact note.

items.name: dashboard
items.title: Dashboard
items.description: A dashboard layout with sidebar navigation, top bar, user menu and injectable nav links for your router.
